title: Close taxonomy-audit regression tests #4-#6
description: Source-mining audit item #5 (origin map-failure-taxonomy-coverage.md #4/#5/#6): three focused test files — decomposer dependency-edge cases, context-summary drift detection negative paths, multi-project isolation — wired into run_tests.sh. Where a taxonomy hole has no detector, the test is written and skipped-with-reason naming the missing mechanism (honest tracked gap, not a fabricated pass). Packet: MAP_System/inbox/helpers/taxonomy-tests-packet.md. Starts after TASK-187 review + TASK-188 release.
acceptance_criteria: Dependency-edge cases (multi-node cycles, self-dependency, dangling IDs, mixed-state diamonds) exercised against validate_task_graph.py.
Drift detectors' negative paths tested: injected drift fires validate_shared_state/validate_task_mirrors.
Isolation tests anchor on documented boundaries; missing mechanisms produce skipped-with-reason tests listed in the report.
All three wired into run_tests.sh; suite green; report gives pass/skip counts and any bugs flushed out.
